assertion_results.text: Step 8 detects existing remediation tasks TC-8100 and TC-8101 via the Depend links on the issue and skips remediation task creation — does NOT create duplicate tasks (idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lists existing Depend links to TC-8100 and TC-8101. idempotency-check.md sections 3-4 explicitly detect both tasks via Depend links and state 'No task creation or link mutation required' for each. triage-outcome.md confirms: 'The skill detects existing Depend links to TC-8100 and TC-8101... no new tasks are created.'

assertion_results.text: The ai-cve-triaged label is already present on the issue — the triage does NOT attempt to add it again (label idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md shows labels include 'ai-cve-triaged'. idempotency-check.md section 1 states: 'The issue's labels field already contains ai-cve-triaged... No label mutation required.' triage-outcome.md confirms: 'Already present on the issue... the skill recognizes its presence and skips the add.'

assertion_results.text: The issue is already In Progress — the triage does NOT attempt to transition the status again or warns that the issue is already in a post-triage state (status idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md shows 'Issue status | In Progress'. idempotency-check.md section 2 states: 'In Progress, which is a post-triage state... issues in In Progress trigger a warning: "This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on."... no status transition is needed.' triage-outcome.md confirms: 'already in In Progress status... detects a non-New status and presents a warning.'

assertion_results.text: The existing description digest comment is detected — no duplicate digest comment is posted (comment idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lists existing description digest comment with hash sha256-md:a1b2c3d4... idempotency-check.md section 5 states: 'A digest comment already exists... No comment mutation required.' triage-outcome.md confirms: 'Description digest comment: Already present (comment #1). The digest protocol checks for an existing digest before posting. Skipped.'

assertion_results.text: The existing post-triage summary comment is detected — no duplicate summary comment is posted (comment idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lists existing post-triage summary comment posted 2026-07-01T10:01:00Z. idempotency-check.md section 6 states: 'A post-triage summary comment already exists with complete triage documentation...
